basic_details.job_title: KSRTC SWIFT Driver cum Conductor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Kerala State Road Transport Corporation SWIFT
basic_details.short_information: Kerala State Road Transport Corporation SWIFT (KSRTC SWIFT) has published the Driver cum Conductor Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill Driver cum Conductor positions. Candidates aged between 25 to 55 years and holding 10th Pass qualification with a valid Driving License under the MV Act 1988 and minimum 5 years of experience in passenger vehicles with 30+ seats are eligible to apply online. The application process will be active until 03-08-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 55 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th Pass, Valid Driving License under MV Act 1988, Minimum 5 years experience in passenger vehicles with 30+ seats
qualification.details: Driver cum Conductor: 10th Pass from a recognized board, a valid Driving License under the Motor Vehicles Act 1988, and a minimum of 5 years of experience driving passenger vehicles with 30 or more seating capacity.

salary_details.details: Rs. 715 Per Day for 8 hours duty.

selection_process: Application Screening Document Verification Rank List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KSRTC SWIFT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: KSRTC SWIFT Driver cum Conductor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the KSRTC SWIFT Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download KSRTC SWIFT Driver cum Conductor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: KSRTC SWIFT Driver cum Conductor Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Driver cum Conductor: 10th Pass from a recognized board, a valid Driving License under the Motor Vehicles Act 1988, and a minimum of 5 years of experience driving passenger vehicles with 30 or more seating capacity.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 55 years Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 715 Per Day for 8 hours duty.

content_sections.heading: KSRTC SWIFT Driver cum Conductor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Application Screening Document Verification Rank List

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KSRTC SWIFT to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: KSRTC SWIFT Driver cum Conductor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KSRTC SWIFT Driver cum Conductor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Driver cum Conductor posts is August 3, 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed the 10th standard from a recognized board. Additionally, a valid driving license under the MV Act 1988 is mandatory for this role.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Driver cum Conductor position?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates need to have a minimum of 5 years of experience in driving passenger vehicles that have a seating capacity of 30 or more seats.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 25 years (minimum) and 55 years (maximum). Specific age relaxations for reserved categories are not detailed in the provided information.

faq.question: Q5. How much is the application fee for KSRTC SWIFT Driver cum Conductor jobs?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Driver cum Conductor post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be paid Rs. 715 per day for an 8-hour duty. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application screening, followed by document verification. Finally, a rank list will be prepared to select the eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the KSRTC SWIFT Driver cum Conductor recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link before the last date. Ensure all details are accurate and required documents are uploaded.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: As per the provided data, the total number of vacancies for the Driver cum Conductor post is 0. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the Important Links section of this article. You can also visit the official website of KSRTC SWIFT for more details.
